experimentDesigns.subtitle: Review and approve AI-generated experiment designs
experimentDesigns.noExperimentDesignsDesc: Experiment designs are created by Research Leads when they analyze research questions. They will appear here for your review.
experimentDesigns.reviewInstructions: Review the content and approve or reject this experiment design.
experimentDesigns.emptyContainer: This experiment design container is empty. Add documents or experiment runs to it.
experimentDesigns.approveExperimentDesignDesc: Optionally add a note for the experiment design creator (e.g., instructions for the agent).
experimentDesigns.rejectExperimentDesignDesc: Please provide a reason for rejecting this experiment design.

experimentDesigns.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this experiment design is about...

experimentDesigns.confirmSubmit: Submit this experiment design for review?

experimentDesigns.closeExperimentDesignDesc: Closing this experiment design is permanent. Please provide a reason.

experimentDesignValidation.title: Submission Checklist
experimentDesignValidation.E1: Must include at least one PRD document
experimentDesignValidation.E3: Must include at least one experiment run
experimentDesignValidation.E4: Must link to at least one input Research Question
experimentDesignValidation.E5: Research Question "{title}" has unresolved hypothesis formulation
experimentDesignValidation.W1: Consider adding a technical design document
experimentDesignValidation.W2: Experiment Run "{title}" is missing a description
experimentDesignValidation.E-AC: Experiment Run "{title}" is missing go/no-go criteria
experimentDesignValidation.W4: Multiple experiment runs exist but no dependencies are defined
experimentDesignValidation.W5: Experiment Design is missing a description
experimentDesignValidation.I1: Experiment Run "{title}" has no priority set
experimentDesignValidation.I2: Experiment Run "{title}" has no compute budget estimated

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and agent configurations
settings.themeDesc: Switch the workspace between light, dark, or system display modes.
settings.agentsDesc: Create API keys to allow your personal agents to access Synapse. Each key can be assigned different roles.

settings.researchLeadDesc: Analyze requirements, write experiment designs, manage experiment runs
settings.principalInvestigatorDesc: Human-level permissions: approve experiment designs, verify experiment runs, create research projects
settings.developerAgentDesc: Execute experiment runs, write code, report issues, commits
settings.pmAgentDesc: Analyze requirements, write experiment designs, manage experiment runs
settings.adminAgentDesc: Human-level permissions: approve experiment designs, verify experiment runs, create research projects

settings.adminConfirmCheckbox: I understand the risks and confirm creating a Principal Investigator Agent
settings.apiKeyCreatedDesc: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!

settings.agentPersonaDesc: Select a preset or write your own persona. This defines how the agent behaves in all interactions.

researchProjectOverview.deleteResearchProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently delete all associated research questions, experiment designs, experiment runs, documents, and activity.

personas.devPmDesc: You are a research lead who prioritizes developer experience and builds developer-first products. You understand technical constraints and communicate effectively with engineering teams.
personas.fullPmDesc: You are a comprehensive research lead with the mindset of building products that solve real problems for your target audience. You balance business goals, user needs, and technical feasibility.
personas.simplePmDesc: You are a focused research lead who prioritizes core features first, avoiding over-engineering. You believe in shipping fast, gathering feedback, and iterating quickly.
personas.seniorDevDesc: You are a senior researcher with extensive experience in building scalable systems. You write clean, maintainable code and follow best practices. You mentor junior researchers and make architectural decisions.
personas.fullstackDevDesc: You are a versatile full-stack researcher comfortable working across the entire stack. You can build APIs, design databases, and create responsive UIs. You prioritize user experience and performance.
personas.pragmaticDevDesc: You are a practical researcher who focuses on delivering working solutions quickly. You avoid premature optimization, write tests for critical paths, and prefer simple solutions over complex abstractions.
personas.carefulAdminDesc: You are a careful principal investigator who thoroughly reviews all experiment designs and experiment runs before approval. You verify that go/no-go criteria are met, check for potential issues, and document your reasoning. When in doubt, you prefer to ask for clarification rather than approve blindly.
personas.efficientAdminDesc: You are an efficient principal investigator who streamlines the approval process while maintaining quality standards. You trust the team's work but still perform necessary checks. You focus on unblocking work quickly while ensuring basic quality gates are met.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this session?

hypothesisFormulation.title: Hypothesis Formulation
hypothesisFormulation.skipConfirmDescription: This will mark requirements as resolved without structured Q&A. You should only skip for trivially clear requests.
hypothesisFormulation.skipReasonPlaceholder: e.g., Bug fix with clear reproduction steps
hypothesisFormulation.hypothesisFormulationRequiredHint: Complete or skip hypothesis formulation to create an experiment design

researchPrograms.noResearchProjectsInGroup: No research projects in this group yet.

researchPrograms.deleteWithResearchProjects: Delete {count, plural, one {# research project} other {# research projects}} permanently

goNoGoCriteria.title: Go/No-Go Criteria
goNoGoCriteria.gateBlocked: Cannot verify: {count} required criteria not yet passed

earlyStop.description: One or more early-stop criteria failed. Review the Go/No-Go criteria and decide whether to close this run.

ideas.title: Research Questions
ideas.subtitle: Track the questions driving your experiments and move them into execution when they are ready.
ideas.canvasHint: Click a research question card to expand the experiments under it and pan across the canvas.
ideas.editHint: Refine this question, change its parent, or add more downstream context.
ideas.parentHint: If you select a parent question, this question can inherit context from that parent's direct experiments.
ideas.whatIsYourIdea: What should the team investigate next?
ideas.emptyColumn: No research questions in this column yet.
ideas.emptyDesc: Once you create the first question, you can branch dependent work, keep parallel threads side by side, and hang experiments off the question tree.
ideas.parallelHint: Parallel questions are linked with dashed lines. Dependency edges are solid.
ideas.noLinkedExperiments: There are no direct experiments under this question yet.
ideas.inheritsParentExperiments: Child-question experiments can inherit context from this question's direct experiments
ideas.deleteResearchQuestionCascadeConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This will permanently remove the question, every child question underneath it, and their linked experiments. This action cannot be undone.

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.subtitle: A single board for draft creation, review, launch, execution, and result capture.
experiments.createSubtitle: Capture the setup, attach any supporting notes, and optionally link the experiment to a research question.
experiments.empty: No experiments in this column yet.

fields.title: Experiment title
fields.titlePlaceholder: For example: Sweep learning rates on the instruction dataset
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Outline the setup, the expected signal, and any implementation notes.
fields.question: Linked research question
fields.attachmentsHelp: Upload notes or specs to keep this experiment self-contained.

detail.noOutcome: No outcome has been recorded yet.
detail.noAttachments: No documents were uploaded for this experiment.
detail.noParentContext: This experiment does not inherit any direct parent-question experiments.
detail.noResults: No structured results have been captured yet.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Project-level synthesis across completed experiments, comparisons, and conclusions.
insights.empty: No synthesis has been generated yet.

header.title: GPU Operations
header.description: Register machines with the least amount of setup, keep telemetry live, and let agents reserve only the GPUs they need.

compute.empty: No compute pools are registered yet. Create a pool and register a machine to expose GPU capacity to your agents.

pool.title: Create pool
pool.description: Group related machines into a single schedulable capacity pool.
pool.emptyMachines: No machines registered in this pool yet.
pool.poolError: Could not create the compute pool.

register.title: Register machine
register.description: Choose an existing SSH config entry, upload a PEM file from your browser, or reference a server-side key path.
register.label: Display label
register.sshConfigDesc: Reuse a machine definition that already exists on the server.
register.uploadPemDesc: Provide host access and upload a browser-side PEM for this machine.
register.manualPathDesc: Use a key path that already exists on the Synapse server.
register.nodeError: Could not create the compute node.

machine.inventoryHint: GPU inventory will appear after the backend or an agent syncs the machine and starts reporting telemetry.

projects.title: Research projects
projects.subtitle: Create, group, and track the research work your team and agents are driving forward.
projects.noProjectsDesc: Create your first research project to start coordinating ideas, experiments, and synthesis.
projects.createFailed: Could not create the research project.

createNew.title: Create a research project
createNew.subtitle: Capture the objective, working context, and starter ideas for this project.
createNew.gettingStartedDesc: Add the context your agents need before they begin proposing ideas or running experiments.
createNew.projectNamePlaceholder: For example: Retrieval fine-tuning for legal assistant
createNew.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe research direction, objectives, and constraints
createNew.goalPlaceholder: Summarize the objective, expected contribution, or decision this project should drive.
createNew.datasetsPlaceholder: Public dataset names, S3 paths, or local paths accessible by your agent. Add a brief note for each.
createNew.datasetsHelp: You can enter a public dataset name, an S3 path your agent can access, or a local path. Add a short note on the same line if needed.
createNew.initialIdeasDesc: Seed the board with a few hypotheses or directions if you already know where to begin.
createNew.ideaPlaceholder: Describe an initial idea, hypothesis, or experiment direction...
createNew.documentsDesc: Upload briefs, specs, or related material to ground the project.
createNew.dragDrop: Drag files here or click to upload
createNew.fileTypes: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown files

projectGroups.descriptionPlaceholder: What kind of work belongs in this group?
projectGroups.createFailed: Could not create the project group.
projectGroups.projectDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this project is trying to achieve.
projectGroups.researchGoalPlaceholder: What should the agent optimize for or prove?
projectGroups.evaluationMethodsPlaceholder: One metric or protocol per line
